rationale: Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic story; no new qualitative change this cycle, baseline holds near prior level.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation — confidence vote pending
top_events.summary: Liberal PM nominee still awaiting confidence vote; political uncertainty continues to affect governance and EU funds absorption in Romania.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue; Iran deal rhetoric from Trump
top_events.summary: Ongoing Beirut strikes and unconfirmed Iran deal have minor indirect effect on Black Sea energy routes and regional stability relevant to Romania.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: Advancing EU accession for Ukraine and Moldova is a positive regional signal for Romania, though no immediate change to daily life.
